{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the conceptual issue of mismatch between the proposed Adaptive Temporal Attention (ATA) and the actual method described, but does not propose a complete reframing.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue with the localized fix being the need to align the introduction with the actual method.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (Mamba) and articulates the delta between the proposed method and Mamba.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for out-of-reach claims related to novelty, scope, and downstream harm avoidance.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift in the proposed method not matching the actual method.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by pointing out that the proposed method is not what was announced in the introduction.",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the conceptual issue of mismatch between the proposed Adaptive Temporal Attention (ATA) and the actual method described, but does not propose a complete reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with the localized fix being the need to align the introduction with the actual method.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Mamba) and articulates the delta between the proposed method and Mamba.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for out-of-reach claims related to novelty, scope, and downstream harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift in the proposed method not matching the actual method.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by pointing out that the proposed method is not what was announced in the introduction.
